events.label: ▶ launcher-picker-opens-on-click · keepFocus spares the native select mousedown
📷 mousedown defaultPrevented = false (must be FALSE — dropdown opens)
▶ launcher-picker-shows-harness-icon · option = name only; adornment = harness SVG that tracks selection
📷 claude launcher → harness glyph: hasSvg=true title=Claude Code
📷 codex launcher → glyph swapped = true (title Claude Code→Codex)
▶ inbox-mention-dropdown-and-resolution · [[ menu in the live ❯ inbox, insert + send-time resolve
📷 accept top row → draft='look at [[term-input]] ' insertedToken=true
